headline: Crysencio Summerville — update
body: Manchester United have added Crysencio Summerville to their list of wide options, as @David_Ornstein called. An enquiry has already been made to West Ham after Summerville scored high in data analysis. Spurs have also called West Ham as Sum
text:
Manchester United have added Crysencio Summerville to their list of wide options, as @David_Ornstein called.

An enquiry has already been made to West Ham after Summerville scored high in data analysis.

Spurs have also called West Ham as Summerville is an option in case Savinho doesn't move.🇳🇱
